title: SVPNPA Tuition Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA )
short_info: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA ) Tuition Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SVPNPA . Has been announced through the SVPNPA Tuition Teacher Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: Not specified Age Relaxation: Not specified

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Bachelor of Science (PCM/PCB) B.Ed/ M.Sc
qualification.details: Tuition Teacher (Science): Graduation in Bachelor of Science (PCM/PCB) with at least 50 percent marks in the desired subject in Graduation and Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) with at least 55 percent marks in the degree. Desirable: Master's degree i.e. M.Sc with 55 percent marks. Minimum 02 years of teaching experience in school/Tuition Centre/Some Private Organisation. Fair command on Hindi, Telugu and English.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the SVPNPA Tuition Teacher post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Tuition Teacher (Science) post at SVP NPA is scheduled for 03 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Tuition Teacher (Science) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduation in Bachelor of Science (PCM/PCB) with at least 50 percent marks and a Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) with at least 55 percent marks. A Master's degree (M.Sc) with 55 percent marks is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any teaching experience required for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 02 years of teaching experience in a school, tuition center, or any private organization is required for the Tuition Teacher (Science) position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Tuition Teacher (Science) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000 per month for the Tuition Teacher (Science) role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Tuition Teacher (Science) post is 21 years. There is no maximum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the SVP NPA Tuition Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for the Tuition Teacher (Science) post going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVP NPA), Hyderabad, Telangana - 500052.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Tuition Teacher (Science) post will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.
